children.heading: Base price
children.label: 1 Base price
children.text: The term “base price” means the price paid for livestock, delivered at the packing plant, before application of any premiums or discounts, expressed in dollars per hundred pounds of carcass weight.

children.heading: Basis level
children.label: 2 Basis level
children.text: The term “basis level” means the agreed-on adjustment to a future price to establish the final price paid for livestock.

children.heading: Current slaughter week
children.label: 3 Current slaughter week
children.text: The term “current slaughter week” means the period beginning Monday, and ending Sunday, of the week in which a reporting day occurs.

children.heading: F.O.B.
children.label: 4 F.O.B.
children.text: The term “F.O.B.” means free on board, regardless of the mode of transportation, at the point of direct shipment by the seller to the buyer.

children.heading: Livestock
children.label: 5 Livestock
children.text: The term “livestock” means cattle, swine, and lambs.

children.heading: Lot
children.label: 6 Lot
children.text: The term “lot” means a group of one or more livestock that is identified for the purpose of a single transaction between a buyer and a seller.

children.heading: Marketing
children.label: 7 Marketing
children.text: The term “marketing” means the sale or other disposition of livestock, livestock products, or meat or meat food products in commerce.

children.label: A
children.text: the base price for the livestock is determined by seller-buyer interaction and agreement on a day; and

children.label: B
children.text: the livestock are scheduled for delivery to the packer not later than 14 days after the date on which the livestock are committed to the packer.

children.label: A
children.text: the base price for the livestock is determined by seller-buyer interaction and agreement on a day; and

children.label: B
children.text: the livestock are scheduled for delivery to the packer not later than 14 days after the date on which the livestock are committed to the packer.

children.heading: Prior slaughter week
children.label: 10 Prior slaughter week
children.text: The term “prior slaughter week” means the Monday through Sunday prior to a reporting day.

children.heading: Producer
children.label: 11 Producer
children.text: The term “producer” means any person engaged in the business of selling livestock to a packer for slaughter (including the sale of livestock from a packer to another packer).

children.label: A
children.text: a packer conducts business regarding livestock committed to the packer, or livestock purchased, sold, or slaughtered by the packer;

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary is required to make information concerning the business described in subparagraph (A) available to the public; and

children.label: C
children.text: the Department of Agriculture is open to conduct business.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 13 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: State
children.label: 14 State
children.text: The term “State” means each of the 50 States.
